name: BibSonomy REST API
description: BibSonomy is a social bookmarking and publication sharing system. The REST API allows interaction with BibSonomy for managing users, posts (publications and bookmarks), tags, concepts, groups, persons, and friends. Supports XML and JSON response formats with pagination.
